message.content:
Replace all FlexCell.Grid references with standard DataGridView in the NX4C REAR solution projects.

Base path: C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC CHINA NX4\NX4C REAR\

## Projects to modify (all are VB.NET):
1. RH_JA01\ (vbproj: RH_JA01(201).vbproj)
2. RH_JA02\ (vbproj: RH_JA02(202).vbproj)
3. RH_JA03\ (vbproj: RH_JA03(203).vbproj)
4. LH_JA01\ (vbproj: LH_JA01(211).vbproj)
5. LH_JA02\ (vbproj: LH_JA02(212).vbproj)
6. END TEST\ (vbproj: END(210).vbproj)
7. SERVER SEARCH\ (vbproj: SERVEr Search.vbproj)
8. KU VIP 2ND BACK\ (vbproj: KU VIP 2ND BACK.vbproj)
9. KU VIP 2ND BACK JA01\ (vbproj: VIP 2ND BACK JA01.vbproj)

Also these FRT projects stored under REAR:
10. JA02\ (vbproj: FRT JA02.vbproj)  
11. JA03\ (vbproj: FRT JA03.vbproj)
12. JA04\ (vbproj: FRT JA04.vbproj)

## What to change in EACH project:

### 1. .vbproj file
Remove the FlexCell reference block (3 lines):
```xml
    <Reference Include="FlexCell, Version=4.3.7.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=6f86587eb70ee309, processorArchitecture=MSIL">
      <SpecificVersion>False</SpecificVersion>
      <HintPath>C:\Program Files (x86)\FlexCell Technologies\FlexCell.NET4\bin\FlexCell.dll</HintPath>
    </Reference>
```

### 2. FrmMain.Designer.vb — I/O Monitor Grid
Replace FlexCell.Grid declaration and initialization with DataGridView.

**Declaration line** (at bottom of file):
Change: `Friend WithEvents Grid1 As FlexCell.Grid`
To: `Friend WithEvents Grid1 As System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView`

**Constructor line**:
Change: `Me.Grid1 = New FlexCell.Grid()`
To: `Me.Grid1 = New System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView()`

**Properties section** — replace the entire Grid1 property block. The FlexCell block looks like:
```vb
Me.Grid1.BorderStyle = FlexCell.BorderStyleEnum.None
Me.Grid1.CheckedImage = Nothing
Me.Grid1.DefaultFont = New System.Drawing.Font("Arial Narrow", 26.0!)
Me.Grid1.DefaultRowHeight = CType(45, Short)
Me.Grid1.Dock = System.Windows.Forms.DockStyle.Fill
Me.Grid1.Font = ...
Me.Grid1.GridColor = ...
Me.Grid1.Location = ...
Me.Grid1.Name = "Grid1"
Me.Grid1.ScrollBars = FlexCell.ScrollBarsEnum.None
Me.Grid1.Size = ...
Me.Grid1.TabIndex = ...
Me.Grid1.UncheckedImage = Nothing
```

Replace with (keep the original Location, Size, TabIndex, Dock values):
```vb
Me.Grid1.AllowUserToAddRows = False
Me.Grid1.AllowUserToDeleteRows = False
Me.Grid1.AllowUserToResizeRows = False
Me.Grid1.BorderStyle = System.Windows.Forms.BorderStyle.None
Me.Grid1.ColumnHeadersHeightSizeMode = System.Windows.Forms.DataGridViewColumnHeadersHeightSizeMode.AutoSize
Me.Grid1.DefaultCellStyle.Font = New System.Drawing.Font("Arial Narrow", 26.0!)
Me.Grid1.Dock = System.Windows.Forms.DockStyle.Fill  (or keep original Dock)
Me.Grid1.Location = (keep original)
Me.Grid1.Name = "Grid1"
Me.Grid1.ReadOnly = True
Me.Grid1.RowHeadersVisible = False
Me.Grid1.RowTemplate.Height = 45
Me.Grid1.ScrollBars = System.Windows.Forms.ScrollBars.None
Me.Grid1.Size = (keep original)
Me.Grid1.TabIndex = (keep original)
```

### 3. FrmMain.vb — Init_Grid method
Replace the FlexCell Init_Grid method:
```vb
    Private Sub Init_Grid(ByVal GridName As FlexCell.Grid)
        ...
    End Sub
```
With:
```vb
    Private Sub Init_Grid(ByVal GridName As DataGridView)

        With GridName
            .Columns.Clear()
            .Rows.Clear()

            .Columns.Add("Col0", "")
            .Columns.Add("Col1", "No.")
            .Columns.Add("Col2", "I/O")
            .Columns.Add("Col3", "Dec.")

            .Columns(0).Width = 0
            .Columns(0).Visible = False
            .Columns(1).Width = 60
            .Columns(2).Width = 80
            .Columns(3).Width = 100

            For Each col As DataGridViewColumn In .Columns
                col.DefaultCellStyle.Alignment = DataGridViewContentAlignment.MiddleCenter
                col.HeaderCell.Style.Alignment = DataGridViewContentAlignment.MiddleCenter
                col.SortMode = DataGridViewColumnSortMode.NotSortable
            Next

        End With

    End Sub
```

### 4. FrmPart.Designer.vb — Part Master Grid (data-bound)
Same pattern as FrmMain.Designer.vb:
- Change declaration: `Friend WithEvents Grid1 As FlexCell.Grid` → `Friend WithEvents Grid1 As System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView`
- Change constructor: `Me.Grid1 = New FlexCell.Grid()` → `Me.Grid1 = New System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView()`
- Replace FlexCell properties with DataGridView equivalent (keep Location, Size, TabIndex):
```vb
Me.Grid1.AllowUserToAddRows = True
Me.Grid1.AllowUserToDeleteRows = True
Me.Grid1.BorderStyle = System.Windows.Forms.BorderStyle.FixedSingle
Me.Grid1.ColumnHeadersHeightSizeMode = System.Windows.Forms.DataGridViewColumnHeadersHeightSizeMode.AutoSize
Me.Grid1.DefaultCellStyle.Font = New System.Drawing.Font("Tahoma", 10.2!)
Me.Grid1.Location = (keep original)
Me.Grid1.Name = "Grid1"
Me.Grid1.RowHeadersVisible = False
Me.Grid1.RowTemplate.Height = 24
Me.Grid1.Size = (keep original)
Me.Grid1.TabIndex = (keep original)
```

### 5. FrmPart.vb — Part Master Code
Replace FlexCell API calls with DataGridView equivalents:

In `SetDataBinding()`:
```vb
' OLD:
Grid1.BoldFixedCell = False
Grid1.DisplayFocusRect = False
Grid1.DisplayRowArrow = True
Grid1.SetDataBinding(myDataSet, "TablePART")
Grid1.Column(0).Width = 10
...
Grid1.Column(8).CellType = FlexCell.CellTypeEnum.CheckBox
Grid1.Column(9).CellType = FlexCell.CellTypeEnum.CheckBox
```
Replace with:
```vb
Grid1.DataSource = myDataSet.Tables("TablePART")

If Grid1.Columns.Count > 0 Then
    Grid1.Columns(0).Width = 10
    Grid1.Columns(0).Visible = False
    Grid1.Columns(1).Width = 0
    Grid1.Columns(1).Visible = False
    Grid1.Columns(2).Width = 110
    Grid1.Columns(3).Width = 200
    Grid1.Columns(4).Width = 80
    Grid1.Columns(5).Width = 80
    Grid1.Columns(6).Width = 80
    Grid1.Columns(7).Width = 80
    Grid1.Columns(8).Width = 80
    Grid1.Columns(9).Width = 80
End If
```

Remove the commented FlexCell lines too.

In `Save_Grid()`:
```vb
' OLD:
Grid1.EndCurrentEdit()
...
intTopRow = Grid1.TopRow
intCurrentRow = Grid1.ActiveCell.Row
intCurrentCol = Grid1.ActiveCell.Col
Grid1.AutoRedraw = False
...
Grid1.Cell(intCurrentRow, intCurrentCol).SetFocus()
Grid1.TopRow = intTopRow
Grid1.AutoRedraw = True
Grid1.Refresh()
```
Replace with:
```vb
Grid1.EndEdit()
...
intTopRow = Grid1.FirstDisplayedScrollingRowIndex
If Grid1.CurrentCell IsNot Nothing Then
    intCurrentRow = Grid1.CurrentCell.RowIndex
    intCurrentCol = Grid1.CurrentCell.ColumnIndex
End If
...
SetDataBinding()
If intCurrentRow < Grid1.Rows.Count AndAlso intCurrentCol < Grid1.Columns.Count Then
    Grid1.CurrentCell = Grid1(intCurrentCol, intCurrentRow)
End If
If intTopRow >= 0 AndAlso intTopRow < Grid1.Rows.Count Then
    Grid1.FirstDisplayedScrollingRowIndex = intTopRow
End If
Grid1.Refresh()
```

### 6. FrmSearch.Designer.vb — Search Grid (data-bound)
Same pattern as FrmPart.Designer.vb for Grid1 declaration, constructor, properties.
Keep Location, Size, TabIndex values. Use AllowUserToAddRows = False, ReadOnly = True.

### 7. FrmSearch.vb — Search Code
Replace:
```vb
Grid1.BoldFixedCell = False
Grid1.DisplayFocusRect = False
Grid1.DisplayRowArrow = True
Grid1.SetDataBinding(myDataSet, "Table_Main")
```
With:
```vb
Grid1.DataSource = myDataSet.Tables("Table_Main")
```

Replace `Grid1.ExportToExcel(...)` with a manual CSV/DataGridView export:
```vb
    Private Sub ConvertExcel()

        Dim excel_name As String = Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "_" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd")
        Dim filePath As String = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel\" & excel_name & ".csv"

        Try
            If Not System.IO.Directory.Exists(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel") Then
                System.IO.Directory.CreateDirectory(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel")
            End If

            Using sw As New System.IO.StreamWriter(filePath, False, System.Text.Encoding.Default)
                ' Header
                Dim headers As New System.Text.StringBuilder()
                For Each col As DataGridViewColumn In Grid1.Columns
                    If headers.Length > 0 Then headers.Append(",")
                    headers.Append("""" & col.HeaderText.Replace("""", """""") & """")
                Next
                sw.WriteLine(headers.ToString())

                ' Rows
                For Each row As DataGridViewRow In Grid1.Rows
                    Dim line As New System.Text.StringBuilder()
                    For Each cell As DataGridViewCell In row.Cells
                        If line.Length > 0 Then line.Append(",")
                        Dim val As String = If(cell.Value IsNot Nothing, cell.Value.ToString(), "")
                        line.Append("""" & val.Replace("""", """""") & """")
                    Next
                    sw.WriteLine(line.ToString())
                Next
            End Using

            MsgBox("Done.", MsgBoxStyle.Exclamation)
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox(ex.Message, MsgBoxStyle.Critical)
        End Try

    End Sub
```

### 8. FrmWorkStandardSet.Designer.vb — Image List Grid
Same pattern for declaration, constructor:
- `Friend WithEvents Grid1 As FlexCell.Grid` → `Friend WithEvents Grid1 As System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView`
- `Me.Grid1 = New FlexCell.Grid()` → `Me.Grid1 = New System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView()`
- Replace FlexCell props with:
```vb
Me.Grid1.AllowUserToAddRows = False
Me.Grid1.BorderStyle = System.Windows.Forms.BorderStyle.FixedSingle
Me.Grid1.ColumnHeadersHeightSizeMode = System.Windows.Forms.DataGridViewColumnHeadersHeightSizeMode.AutoSize
Me.Grid1.DefaultCellStyle.Font = New System.Drawing.Font("Arial Narrow", 12.0!)
Me.Grid1.Location = (keep original)
Me.Grid1.Margin = (keep original)
Me.Grid1.Name = "Grid1"
Me.Grid1.RowHeadersVisible = False
Me.Grid1.RowTemplate.Height = 20
Me.Grid1.ScrollBars = System.Windows.Forms.ScrollBars.Vertical
Me.Grid1.Size = (keep original)
Me.Grid1.TabIndex = (keep original)
```

### 9. FrmWorkStandardSet.vb — Image List Code
Replace all FlexCell API calls:

```vb
' Grid_Init — replace:
    Private Sub Grid_Init()
        With Grid1
            .Columns.Clear()
            .Rows.Clear()

            .Columns.Add("Col0", "")
            .Columns.Add("Col1", "")
            .Columns.Add("Col2", "ImageFile")

            .Columns(0).Width = 10
            .Columns(0).Visible = False
            .Columns(1).Width = 30
            .Columns(2).Width = 500

            .AllowUserToAddRows = False
        End With
    End Sub

' Load_Grid — replace .AddItem with DataGridView row add:
' OLD: .AddItem(Rs.Fields("ID").Value & Chr(9) & Rs.Fields("StandardFile").Value)
' NEW: .Rows.Add(Nothing, Rs.Fields("ID").Value, Rs.Fields("StandardFile").Value)

' Save_Grid — replace Grid1.Cell(i, 2).Text with:
' Grid1.Rows(i).Cells(2).Value?.ToString()
' And adjust i to be 0-based (DataGridView rows are 0-based, FlexCell had 1-based with header at 0)

' Grid1_MouseClick1 — replace:
' Grid1.Selection.FirstRow → Grid1.CurrentRow.Index
' Grid1.Cell(Click_Index, 2).Text → Grid1.Rows(Click_Index).Cells(2).Value?.ToString()
' Setting: Grid1.Rows(Click_Index).Cells(2).Value = Open.FileName

' Delete_GRid call:
' Grid1.Cell(Click_Index, 1).Text → Grid1.Rows(Click_Index).Cells(1).Value?.ToString()

' Remove Grid1_Load handler (empty, and DataGridView has no Load event)
```

IMPORTANT: When replacing FrmWorkStandardSet.vb, note that FlexCell was 1-based for data rows (row 0 was header). DataGridView rows are 0-based (headers are separate). So in Save_Grid, the loop counter starting at `i = 1` should change to `i = 0`. And in Load_Grid, remove the With Grid1 ... End With wrapping since we just call Grid1.Rows.Add.

### 10. FrmAngleSet (JA03 only)
Check if FrmAngleSet.vb and FrmAngleSet.Designer.vb exist in any REAR project and apply similar replacement.

### 11. FrmToolSet (KU VIP 2ND BACK JA01 only)
Check FrmToolSet.vb/Designer.vb for FlexCell usage and replace similarly.

## Additional notes for specific projects:
- SERVER SEARCH FrmMain.vb uses `Grid1.SetDataBinding` and `Grid1.ExportToExcel` — replace with `Grid1.DataSource` and CSV export
- SERVER SEARCH FrmMain.Designer.vb — same pattern replacement
- END TEST may have additional Grid usage — check all files
- Some projects may have FrmSearch but not FrmPart, or vice versa. Read each file before editing.
- Always read the file first before making edits!
- For each project, first check what files exist (FrmMain, FrmPart, FrmSearch, FrmWorkStandardSet, FrmAngleSet, FrmToolSet)

## CRITICAL RULES:
1. READ each file before editing — never edit blind
2. Keep original Location, Size, TabIndex, Margin, Dock values exactly as they were  
3. Remove ALL FlexCell enum references (FlexCell.BorderStyleEnum, FlexCell.ScrollBarsEnum, FlexCell.AlignmentEnum, etc)
4. The `Imports` at file top usually don't import FlexCell namespace (it's fully qualified), but check and remove if present
5. Do NOT modify any non-FlexCell related code
6. Process each project completely before moving to the next
7. Start with RH_JA01, then move through the list

   397→                DO_OFF(3)

   506→    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String
   507→
   508→        Dim tmp As String = ""
   509→        Dim i As Integer
   510→
   511→        For i = 1 To Len(str)
   512→            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
   513→        Next
   514→
   515→        Return tmp
   516→
   517→    End Function

   519→    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String
   520→
   521→        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, retVal As String
   522→        Dim i As Integer
   523→
   524→        retVal = ""
   525→        For i = 1 To Len(str)
   526→            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
   527→            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
   528→                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
   529→                i = i + 1
   530→            Else
   531→                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
   532→                i = i + 3
   533→            End If
   534→            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
   535→        Next
   536→        Return retVal
   537→
   538→    End Function

   715→    Private Sub ThreadTask1()
   716→
   717→        Dim Tmp As String = ""
   718→        Dim Incoming2 As String = ""

   720→        Dim sRecvCount2 As Integer = 0
   721→        Dim TQ_VALUE2 As Double = 0
   722→        Dim i As Integer
   723→
   724→        Do While 1
   725→
   726→            ' 01 80 03 01 07 01           0D 09 42   01 F7 09 42   09 2F 01 F4                      19  52  25    32  AE 01 78  72  70  27  43            1D    1D          94                                 56
   727→
   728→            If Serial_Tool.IsOpen = True Then
   729→
   730→                Incoming2 = Serial_Tool.ReadByte
   731→                If Incoming2 Is Nothing Then
   732→                Else
   733→                    sRecvData2(sRecvCount2) = Dec2Hex(Incoming2)
   734→                    sRecvCount2 = sRecvCount2 + 1
   735→                    If sRecvCount2 >= 132 Then
   736→                        sRecvCount2 = 0
   737→                        'Label_Tool1.Text = sRecvData1(5) & "/" & sRecvData1(23) & "/" & sRecvData1(24) & "/" & sRecvData1(27) & "/" & sRecvData1(28)

   739→
   740→                        Try
   741→
   742→                            If wStep = 4 Then

   744→                                'label_tool2.Text = TQ_VALUE2
   745→                                'If TOOL2_COUNT < TOOL2_NUM Then
   746→                                If srcTQ1Dec.Text <> "OK" And srcTQ2Dec.Text <> "OK" Then
   747→                                    If TQ_VALUE2 >= Basic_TQ_MIN And TQ_VALUE2 <= Basic_TQ_MAX And sRecvData2(5) = "01" Then
   748→                                        srcTQ1Value.Text = TQ_VALUE2
   749→                                        srcTQ1Dec.Text = "OK"
   750→                                        srcTQ1Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
   751→                                        DingDOng()

   754→                                        srcTQ1Dec.Text = "NG"
   755→                                        srcTQ1Dec.BackColor = Color.Red

   758→                                ElseIf srcTQ1Dec.Text = "OK" And srcTQ2Dec.Text <> "OK" Then
   759→                                    If TQ_VALUE2 >= Basic_TQ_MIN And TQ_VALUE2 <= Basic_TQ_MAX And sRecvData2(5) = "01" Then

   761→                                        srcTQ2Dec.Text = "OK"

   767→                                        srcTQ2Dec.BackColor = Color.Red
   768→                                        NG()
   769→                                    End If

   772→
   773→                        Catch ex As Exception
   774→                        End Try
   775→
   776→                        For i = 0 To 200

   778→                        Next

   781→                    End If

    97→    Private Sub Save_Grid()
    98→
    99→        Dim intTopRow, intCurrentRow, intCurrentCol As Integer
   100→        Dim myCommandBuilder As System.Data.OleDb.OleDbCommandBuilder
   101→
   102→        'End the current edit operation
   103→        Grid1.EndCurrentEdit()
   104→
   105→        'Command
   106→        myCommandBuilder = New System.Data.OleDb.OleDbCommandBuilder(myDataAdapter)
   107→        myDataAdapter.DeleteCommand = myCommandBuilder.GetDeleteCommand()
   108→        myDataAdapter.UpdateCommand = myCommandBuilder.GetUpdateCommand()
   109→        myDataAdapter.InsertCommand = myCommandBuilder.GetInsertCommand()
   110→
   111→        Try
   112→            'Save to database
   113→            myDataAdapter.Update(myDataSet.Tables("TablePart"))
   114→        Catch ex As Exception
   115→            myCommandBuilder.Dispose()
   116→            MsgBox(ex.Message, MsgBoxStyle.Exclamation)
   117→            Return
   118→        End Try

   120→        myCommandBuilder.Dispose()
   121→        myDataSet.Dispose()

   127→        intCurrentCol = Grid1.ActiveCell.Col

   133→        Grid1.TopRow = intTopRow

   151→        FrmMain.Serial_Printer.Write("^FO" & "220" & "," & "150" & "^A0N," & "60" & "," & "30" & "^FD" & str2 & "^FS")

   170→

    87→        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
    88→        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
    89→        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
    90→
    91→        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Image", Mdb_Connect)
    92→
    93→        With Grid1
    94→
    95→            If Rs.RecordCount <= 0 Then
    96→
    97→                'MsgBox("Empty Point Info.")
    98→
    99→            ElseIf Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
   100→
   101→                Rs.Fields("StandardFile").Value = Grid1.Cell(1, 2).Text
   102→                Rs.Update()
   103→
   104→            Else
   105→
   106→                Rs.MoveFirst()
   107→                i = 1
   108→
   109→                Do Until Rs.EOF
   110→
   111→                    Rs.Fields("StandardFile").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 2).Text
   112→                    i = i + 1
   113→                    Rs.Update()
   114→                    Rs.MoveNext()
   115→
   116→                Loop
   117→
   118→            End If
   119→
   120→            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
   121→            Rs.Close()
   122→
   123→        End With

   154→        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

    57→

   112→    Public Sub Save_Grid(str As String)
   113→
   114→        Connection_Open_MDB()
   115→
   116→        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
   117→        Dim i As Integer
   118→
   119→        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
   120→        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
   121→        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
   122→
   123→        If str = "Tool1" Then
   124→            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Tool1_Set ORDER BY LEN(TOOL_ID),TOOL_ID", Mdb_Connect)
   125→        ElseIf str = "Tool2" Then
   126→            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Tool2_Set ORDER BY LEN(TOOL_ID),TOOL_ID", Mdb_Connect)
   127→        ElseIf str = "Tool3" Then
   128→            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Tool3_Set ORDER BY LEN(TOOL_ID),TOOL_ID", Mdb_Connect)
   129→        ElseIf str = "Tool4" Then
   130→            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Tool4_Set ORDER BY LEN(TOOL_ID),TOOL_ID", Mdb_Connect)
   131→        End If
   132→
   133→        With Grid1
   134→
   135→            If Rs.RecordCount > 0 Then
   136→
   137→                Rs.MoveFirst()
   138→                i = 1
   139→
   140→                Do Until Rs.EOF
   141→
   142→                    Rs.Fields("IMAGE_X").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 3).Text
   143→                    Rs.Fields("IMAGE_Y").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 4).Text
   144→                    Rs.Fields("IMAGE_W").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 5).Text
   145→                    Rs.Fields("IMAGE_H").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 6).Text
   146→                    Rs.Fields("IO_1").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 7).Text
   147→                    Rs.Fields("IO_2").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 8).Text
   148→
   149→                    i = i + 1
   150→
   151→                    Rs.Update()
   152→                    Rs.MoveNext()
   153→
   154→                Loop
   155→
   156→            End If
   157→
   158→            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
   159→            Rs.Close()
   160→
   161→        End With
   162→
   163→        Connection_Close_MDB()
   164→
   165→    End Sub

   167→    Private Sub Load_Grid(str As String)
   168→
   169→        Connection_Open_MDB()
   170→
   171→        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
   172→
   173→        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
   174→        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
   175→        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
   176→
   177→        Grid_Init()
   178→
   179→        'Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Tool_Count2 WHERE PART_NO = '" & str1 & "' AND TOOL_NUM = '" & str2 & "'", Mdb_Connect)
   180→        If str = "Tool1" Then
   181→            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Tool1_Set ORDER BY LEN(TOOL_ID),TOOL_ID", Mdb_Connect)
   182→        ElseIf str = "Tool2" Then
   183→            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Tool2_Set ORDER BY LEN(TOOL_ID),TOOL_ID", Mdb_Connect)
   184→        ElseIf str = "Tool3" Then
   185→            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Tool3_Set ORDER BY LEN(TOOL_ID),TOOL_ID", Mdb_Connect)
   186→        ElseIf str = "Tool4" Then
   187→            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Tool4_Set ORDER BY LEN(TOOL_ID),TOOL_ID", Mdb_Connect)
   188→
   189→        End If
   190→
   191→        With Grid1
   192→
   193→            If Rs.RecordCount > 0 Then
   194→
   195→                Rs.MoveFirst()
   196→                Dim i As Integer = 1
   197→                Do Until Rs.EOF
   198→
   199→                    .AddItem(Rs.Fields("ID").Value & Chr(9) &
   200→                             Rs.Fields("TOOL_ID").Value & Chr(9) &
   201→                             Rs.Fields("Image_X").Value & Chr(9) &
   202→                             Rs.Fields("Image_Y").Value & Chr(9) &
   203→                             Rs.Fields("Image_W").Value & Chr(9) &
   204→                             Rs.Fields("Image_H").Value & Chr(9) &
   205→                             Rs.Fields("IO_1").Value & Chr(9) &
   206→                             Rs.Fields("IO_2").Value & Chr(9))
   207→
   208→                    If str = "Tool1" Then
   209→
   210→                        TOOL1_X(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("Image_X").Value)
   211→                        TOOL1_Y(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("Image_Y").Value)
   212→                        TOOL1_W(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("Image_W").Value)
   213→                        TOOL1_H(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("Image_H").Value)

   215→                            TOOL1_IO1(i) = 100
   216→                        Else
   217→                            TOOL1_IO1(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("IO_1").Value)
   218→                        End If
   219→
   220→                        If Rs.Fields("IO_2").Value = "NONE" Then
   221→                            TOOL1_IO2(i) = 100
   222→                        Else
   223→                            TOOL1_IO2(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("IO_2").Value)
   224→                        End If
   225→
   226→                    ElseIf str = "Tool2" Then
   227→
   228→                        TOOL2_X(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("Image_X").Value)
   229→                        TOOL2_Y(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("Image_Y").Value)
   230→                        TOOL2_W(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("Image_W").Value)
   231→                        TOOL2_H(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("Image_H").Value)
   232→                        If Rs.Fields("IO_1").Value = "NONE" Then
   233→                            TOOL2_IO1(i) = 100
   234→                        Else
   235→                            TOOL2_IO1(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("IO_1").Value)
   236→                        End If
   237→
   238→                        If Rs.Fields("IO_2").Value = "NONE" Then
   239→                            TOOL2_IO2(i) = 100
   240→                        Else
   241→                            TOOL2_IO2(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("IO_2").Value)
   242→                        End If
   243→                    ElseIf str = "Tool3" Then
   244→
   245→                        TOOL3_X(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("Image_X").Value)
   246→                        TOOL3_Y(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("Image_Y").Value)
   247→                        TOOL3_W(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("Image_W").Value)
   248→                        TOOL3_H(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("Image_H").Value)
   249→                        If Rs.Fields("IO_1").Value = "NONE" Then
   250→                            TOOL3_IO1(i) = 100
   251→                        Else
   252→                            TOOL3_IO1(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("IO_1").Value)
   253→                        End If
   254→
   255→                        If Rs.Fields("IO_2").Value = "NONE" Then
   256→                            TOOL3_IO2(i) = 100
   257→                        Else
   258→                            TOOL3_IO2(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("IO_2").Value)
   259→                        End If
   260→                    ElseIf str = "Tool4" Then
   261→
   262→                        TOOL4_X(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("Image_X").Value)
   263→                        TOOL4_Y(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("Image_Y").Value)
   264→                        TOOL4_W(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("Image_W").Value)
   265→                        TOOL4_H(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("Image_H").Value)
   266→                        If Rs.Fields("IO_1").Value = "NONE" Then
   267→                            TOOL4_IO1(i) = 100

   270→                        End If
   271→
   272→                        If Rs.Fields("IO_2").Value = "NONE" Then
   273→                            TOOL4_IO2(i) = 100
   274→                        Else
   275→                            TOOL4_IO2(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("IO_2").Value)
   276→                        End If
   277→                    End If
   278→
   279→                    i = i + 1
   280→                    Rs.MoveNext()
   281→
   282→                Loop
   283→
   284→                Shape_index = Rs.RecordCount
   285→
   286→            End If
   287→
   288→            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
   289→            Rs.Close()
   290→
   291→        End With
   292→
   293→        Connection_Close_MDB()

import re, os, sys

BASE = r"C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC CHINA NX4\NX4C REAR"
# Convert to forward slashes for consistency
BASE = BASE.replace("\\", "/")

def read_file(path):
    with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8-sig', errors='replace') as f:
        return f.read()

def write_file(path, content):
    with open(path, 'w', encoding='utf-8-sig', errors='replace') as f:
        f.write(content)

def remove_flexcell_reference_vbproj(path):
    """Remove FlexCell reference block from .vbproj"""
    content = read_file(path)
    # Match the 3-line FlexCell reference block
    pattern = r'\s*<Reference Include="FlexCell[^"]*">\s*\n\s*<SpecificVersion>False</SpecificVersion>\s*\n\s*<HintPath>[^<]*FlexCell[^<]*</HintPath>\s*\n\s*</Reference>'
    new_content = re.sub(pattern, '', content)
    if new_content != content:
        write_file(path, new_content)
        print(f"  [vbproj] Removed FlexCell reference: {os.path.basename(path)}")
    else:
        print(f"  [vbproj] No FlexCell reference found: {os.path.basename(path)}")

def fix_frmmain_designer(path):
    """Fix FrmMain.Designer.vb - I/O Monitor Grid"""
    content = read_file(path)
    orig = content
    
    # Replace constructor line
    content = content.replace('New FlexCell.Grid()', 'New System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView()')
    
    # Replace declaration
    content = content.replace('Friend WithEvents Grid1 As FlexCell.Grid', 'Friend WithEvents Grid1 As System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView')
    # For KU VIP 2ND BACK JA01 which uses Grid2
    content = content.replace('Friend WithEvents Grid2 As FlexCell.Grid', 'Friend WithEvents Grid2 As System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView')
    
    # Replace Grid1 properties block - find and replace the FlexCell-specific properties
    # Pattern: Me.Grid1.BorderStyle = FlexCell.BorderStyleEnum.None ... Me.Grid1.UncheckedImage = Nothing
    for grid_name in ['Grid1', 'Grid2']:
        # Find the property block for this grid
        pattern = rf"('{grid_name}\s*\n\s*'\s*\n)"
        # Get location/size/tabindex/dock/anchor/margin values
        loc_match = re.search(rf'Me\.{grid_name}\.Location = (.+)', content)
        size_match = re.search(rf'Me\.{grid_name}\.Size = (.+)', content)
        tab_match = re.search(rf'Me\.{grid_name}\.TabIndex = (.+)', content)
        dock_match = re.search(rf'Me\.{grid_name}\.Dock = (.+)', content)
        anchor_match = re.search(rf'Me\.{grid_name}\.Anchor = (.+?)$', content, re.MULTILINE)
        margin_match = re.search(rf'Me\.{grid_name}\.Margin = (.+)', content)
        autosize_match = re.search(rf'Me\.{grid_name}\.AutoSize = (.+)', content)
        
        if not loc_match and not size_match:
            continue
            
        loc_val = loc_match.group(1).strip() if loc_match else 'New System.Drawing.Point(0, 0)'
        size_val = size_match.group(1).strip() if size_match else 'New System.Drawing.Size(342, 608)'
        tab_val = tab_match.group(1).strip() if tab_match else '22'
        
        # Check if it's an I/O monitor type (has DockStyle.Fill or BorderStyleEnum.None)
        is_io_monitor = f'Me.{grid_name}.Dock = System.Windows.Forms.DockStyle.Fill' in content or f'Me.{grid_name}.BorderStyle = FlexCell.BorderStyleEnum.None' in content
        
        # Check if it's FixedSingle style (Part/WorkStandard/Angle/ToolSet grids)
        is_fixed_single = f'Me.{grid_name}.BorderStyle = FlexCell.BorderStyleEnum.FixedSingle' in content
        
        # Remove all existing FlexCell property lines for this grid
        props_to_remove = [
            rf'Me\.{grid_name}\.BorderStyle = FlexCell\.BorderStyleEnum\.\w+\s*\n',
            rf'Me\.{grid_name}\.CheckedImage = Nothing\s*\n',
            rf'Me\.{grid_name}\.DefaultFont = .+\n',
            rf'Me\.{grid_name}\.DefaultRowHeight = .+\n',
            rf'Me\.{grid_name}\.Font = .+\n',
            rf'Me\.{grid_name}\.GridColor = .+\n',
            rf'Me\.{grid_name}\.Location = .+\n',
            rf'Me\.{grid_name}\.Name = .+\n',
            rf'Me\.{grid_name}\.ScrollBars = FlexCell\.ScrollBarsEnum\.\w+\s*\n',
            rf'Me\.{grid_name}\.Size = .+\n',
            rf'Me\.{grid_name}\.TabIndex = .+\n',
            rf'Me\.{grid_name}\.UncheckedImage = Nothing\s*\n',
            rf'Me\.{grid_name}\.Dock = .+\n',
            rf'Me\.{grid_name}\.Anchor = .+\n',
            rf'Me\.{grid_name}\.Margin = .+\n',
            rf'Me\.{grid_name}\.AutoSize = .+\n',
        ]
        
        for prop_pattern in props_to_remove:
            content = re.sub(r'\s*' + prop_pattern, '\n', content)
        
        # Build replacement properties
        if is_io_monitor:
            # I/O Monitor grid (FrmMain)
            new_props = f"""        Me.{grid_name}.AllowUserToAddRows = False
        Me.{grid_name}.AllowUserToDeleteRows = False
        Me.{grid_name}.AllowUserToResizeRows = False
        Me.{grid_name}.BorderStyle = System.Windows.Forms.BorderStyle.None
        Me.{grid_name}.ColumnHeadersHeightSizeMode = System.Windows.Forms.DataGridViewColumnHeadersHeightSizeMode.AutoSize
        Me.{grid_name}.DefaultCellStyle.Font = New System.Drawing.Font("Arial Narrow", 26.0!)"""
            if dock_match:
                new_props += f"\n        Me.{grid_name}.Dock = System.Windows.Forms.DockStyle.Fill"
            if anchor_match:
                new_props += f"\n        Me.{grid_name}.Anchor = {anchor_match.group(1).strip()}"
            new_props += f"""
        Me.{grid_name}.Location = {loc_val}
        Me.{grid_name}.Name = "{grid_name}"
        Me.{grid_name}.ReadOnly = True
        Me.{grid_name}.RowHeadersVisible = False
        Me.{grid_name}.RowTemplate.Height = 45
        Me.{grid_name}.ScrollBars = System.Windows.Forms.ScrollBars.None
        Me.{grid_name}.Size = {size_val}
        Me.{grid_name}.TabIndex = {tab_val}
"""
        elif is_fixed_single:
            # Check if it's a ToolSet grid (has ScrollBarsEnum.None and DefaultFont 18)
            has_scroll_none = f'FlexCell.ScrollBarsEnum.None' in orig and grid_name == 'Grid2'
            has_scroll_vert = f'FlexCell.ScrollBarsEnum.Vertical' in orig
            
            # Get default font and row height from original
            font_match = re.search(rf'Me\.{grid_name}\.DefaultFont = New System\.Drawing\.Font\("([^"]+)",\s*([\d.]+)', orig)
            height_match = re.search(rf'Me\.{grid_name}\.DefaultRowHeight = CType\((\d+)', orig)
            font_name = font_match.group(1) if font_match else "Arial Narrow"
            font_size = font_match.group(2) if font_match else "12.0"
            row_height = height_match.group(1) if height_match else "24"
            
            scrollbar = "System.Windows.Forms.ScrollBars.None" if has_scroll_none else ("System.Windows.Forms.ScrollBars.Vertical" if has_scroll_vert else "System.Windows.Forms.ScrollBars.Both")
            
            new_props = f"""        Me.{grid_name}.AllowUserToAddRows = False
        Me.{grid_name}.BorderStyle = System.Windows.Forms.BorderStyle.FixedSingle
        Me.{grid_name}.ColumnHeadersHeightSizeMode = System.Windows.Forms.DataGridViewColumnHeadersHeightSizeMode.AutoSize
        Me.{grid_name}.DefaultCellStyle.Font = New System.Drawing.Font("{font_name}", {font_size}!)"""
            if autosize_match:
                new_props += f"\n        Me.{grid_name}.AutoSize = {autosize_match.group(1).strip()}"
            if anchor_match:
                new_props += f"\n        Me.{grid_name}.Anchor = {anchor_match.group(1).strip()}"
            new_props += f"""
        Me.{grid_name}.Location = {loc_val}"""
            if margin_match:
                new_props += f"\n        Me.{grid_name}.Margin = {margin_match.group(1).strip()}"
            new_props += f"""
        Me.{grid_name}.Name = "{grid_name}"
        Me.{grid_name}.RowHeadersVisible = False
        Me.{grid_name}.RowTemplate.Height = {row_height}
        Me.{grid_name}.ScrollBars = {scrollbar}
        Me.{grid_name}.Size = {size_val}
        Me.{grid_name}.TabIndex = {tab_val}
"""
        else:
            # Search grid (no border style specified - data-bound, read-only)
            new_props = f"""        Me.{grid_name}.AllowUserToAddRows = False
        Me.{grid_name}.AllowUserToDeleteRows = False
        Me.{grid_name}.BorderStyle = System.Windows.Forms.BorderStyle.FixedSingle
        Me.{grid_name}.ColumnHeadersHeightSizeMode = System.Windows.Forms.DataGridViewColumnHeadersHeightSizeMode.AutoSize
        Me.{grid_name}.DefaultCellStyle.Font = New System.Drawing.Font("Arial Narrow", 11.25!)
        Me.{grid_name}.Location = {loc_val}"""
            if margin_match:
                new_props += f"\n        Me.{grid_name}.Margin = {margin_match.group(1).strip()}"
            new_props += f"""
        Me.{grid_name}.Name = "{grid_name}"
        Me.{grid_name}.ReadOnly = True
        Me.{grid_name}.RowHeadersVisible = False
        Me.{grid_name}.RowTemplate.Height = 24
        Me.{grid_name}.Size = {size_val}
        Me.{grid_name}.TabIndex = {tab_val}
"""
        
        # Insert new properties after the comment block
        comment_pattern = rf"('{grid_name}\s*\n\s*'\s*\n\s*)"
        match = re.search(comment_pattern, content)
        if match:
            content = content[:match.end()] + new_props + content[match.end():]
    
    if content != orig:
        write_file(path, content)
        print(f"  [Designer] Fixed: {os.path.basename(path)}")
    else:
        print(f"  [Designer] No changes needed: {os.path.basename(path)}")

def fix_frmmain_vb(path):
    """Fix FrmMain.vb - Init_Grid method"""
    content = read_file(path)
    orig = content
    
    # Replace Init_Grid method
    pattern = r'Private Sub Init_Grid\(ByVal GridName As FlexCell\.Grid\).*?End Sub'
    replacement = """Private Sub Init_Grid(ByVal GridName As DataGridView)

        With GridName
            .Columns.Clear()

            .Columns.Add("Col0", "")

            For Each col As DataGridViewColumn In .Columns
                col.DefaultCellStyle.Alignment = DataGridViewContentAlignment.MiddleCenter

                col.SortMode = DataGridViewColumnSortMode.NotSortable
            Next

        End With

    End Sub"""
    content = re.sub(pattern, replacement, content, flags=re.DOTALL)
    
    if content != orig:

def fix_frmpart_vb(path):

    content = content.replace('intCurrentCol = Grid1.ActiveCell.Col', """intCurrentCol = Grid1.CurrentCell.ColumnIndex

    content = content.replace('Grid1.AutoRedraw = False', '')

    content = content.replace('Grid1.AutoRedraw = True', '')

    set_binding_match = re.search(r'Grid1\.SetDataBinding\(myDataSet,\s*"([^"]+)"\)', content)
    if set_binding_match:
        table_name = set_binding_match.group(1)

    # Remove commented FlexCell lines

    if re.search(export_pattern, content):

        # Also fix the ConvertExcel method to use CSV export
        # Find the ConvertExcel method
        convert_pattern = r'(Private Sub ConvertExcel\(\).*?)(End Sub)'
        match = re.search(convert_pattern, content, re.DOTALL)
        if match:
            # Get the excel_name line
            name_match = re.search(r'Dim excel_name As String = (.+)', match.group(1))
            name_expr = name_match.group(1).strip() if name_match else 'Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "_" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd")'
            
            new_convert = f'''Private Sub ConvertExcel()

        Dim excel_name As String = {name_expr}
        Dim filePath As String = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\\Excel\\" & excel_name & ".csv"

            If Not System.IO.Directory.Exists(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\\Excel") Then
                System.IO.Directory.CreateDirectory(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\\Excel")
            End If

            Using sw As New System.IO.StreamWriter(filePath, False, System.Text.Encoding.Default)
                ' Header
                Dim headers As New System.Text.StringBuilder()
                For Each col As DataGridViewColumn In Grid1.Columns
                    If headers.Length > 0 Then headers.Append(",")
                    headers.Append("""" & col.HeaderText.Replace("""", """""") & """")
                Next
                sw.WriteLine(headers.ToString())

                ' Rows
                For Each row As DataGridViewRow In Grid1.Rows
                    Dim line As New System.Text.StringBuilder()
                    For Each cell As DataGridViewCell In row.Cells
                        If line.Length > 0 Then line.Append(",")
                        Dim val As String = If(cell.Value IsNot Nothing, cell.Value.ToString(), "")
                        line.Append("""" & val.Replace("""", """""") & """")
                    Next
                    sw.WriteLine(line.ToString())
                Next
            End Using

            MsgBox("Done.", MsgBoxStyle.Exclamation)
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox(ex.Message, MsgBoxStyle.Critical)
        End Try

    End Sub'''
            content = re.sub(convert_pattern, new_convert, content, flags=re.DOTALL)
    
    # Clean up multiple blank lines
    content = re.sub(r'\n{4,}', '\n\n\n', content)
    
    if content != orig:
        write_file(path, content)
        print(f"  [FrmSearch.vb] Fixed: {os.path.basename(path)}")

    loc_val = loc_match.group(1).strip() if loc_match else 'New System.Drawing.Point(10, 16)'
    size_val = size_match.group(1).strip() if size_match else 'New System.Drawing.Size(599, 387)'
    tab_val = tab_match.group(1).strip() if tab_match else '101'
    
    for prop in ['BorderStyle = FlexCell', 'CheckedImage', 'DefaultFont', 'DefaultRowHeight',
                 'Font =', 'GridColor', 'Location', 'Name', 'ScrollBars', 'Size', 'TabIndex', 'UncheckedImage', 'Margin']:
        content = re.sub(rf'\s*Me\.Grid1\.{prop}.+\n', '\n', content)
    
    new_props = f"""        Me.Grid1.AllowUserToAddRows = False

"""
    
    comment_pattern = r"('Grid1\s*\n\s*'\s*\n\s*)"

        content = content[:match.end()] + new_props + content[match.end():]

def fix_frmworkstandardset_vb(path):
    """Fix FrmWorkStandardSet.vb"""
    if not os.path.exists(path):
        return
    content = read_file(path)
    orig = content
    
    # Replace Grid_Init
    pattern = r'Private Sub Grid_Init\(\).*?End Sub'
    replacement = """Private Sub Grid_Init()
        With Grid1
            .Columns.Clear()
            .Rows.Clear()

            .Columns.Add("Col0", "")
            .Columns.Add("Col1", "")
            .Columns.Add("Col2", "ImageFile")

            .Columns(0).Width = 10
            .Columns(0).Visible = False
            .Columns(1).Width = 30
            .Columns(2).Width = 500

            .AllowUserToAddRows = False
        End With

    End Sub"""
    content = re.sub(pattern, replacement, content, flags=re.DOTALL)
    
    # Replace Load_Grid: .AddItem(Rs.Fields("ID").Value & Chr(9) & Rs.Fields("StandardFile").Value)
    content = content.replace('.AddItem(Rs.Fields("ID").Value & Chr(9) & Rs.Fields("StandardFile").Value)',
                              'Grid1.Rows.Add(Nothing, Rs.Fields("ID").Value, Rs.Fields("StandardFile").Value)')
    
    # Fix Save_Grid: Grid1.Cell(1, 2).Text → Grid1.Rows(0).Cells(2).Value
    content = content.replace('Grid1.Cell(1, 2).Text', 'If(Grid1.Rows(0).Cells(2).Value IsNot Nothing, Grid1.Rows(0).Cells(2).Value.ToString(), "")')
    
    # Grid1.Cell(i, 2).Text → Grid1.Rows(i-1).Cells(2).Value  -- but need 0-based
    # In Save_Grid, i starts at 1. Replace the pattern
    content = content.replace('Rs.Fields("StandardFile").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 2).Text',
                              'Rs.Fields("StandardFile").Value = If(Grid1.Rows(i - 1).Cells(2).Value IsNot Nothing, Grid1.Rows(i - 1).Cells(2).Value.ToString(), "")')
    
    # Fix MouseClick handler
    content = content.replace('Click_Index = Grid1.Selection.FirstRow',
                              'If Grid1.CurrentRow IsNot Nothing Then Click_Index = Grid1.CurrentRow.Index')
    content = content.replace('tmp = Grid1.Cell(Click_Index, 2).Text',
                              'tmp = If(Grid1.Rows(Click_Index).Cells(2).Value IsNot Nothing, Grid1.Rows(Click_Index).Cells(2).Value.ToString(), "")')
    content = content.replace('Grid1.Cell(Click_Index, 2).Text = tmp',
                              'Grid1.Rows(Click_Index).Cells(2).Value = tmp')
    content = content.replace('Grid1.Cell(Click_Index, 2).Text = Open.FileName',
                              'Grid1.Rows(Click_Index).Cells(2).Value = Open.FileName')
    
    # Fix Delete_GRid call
    content = content.replace('Delete_GRid(Grid1.Cell(Click_Index, 1).Text)',
                              'Delete_GRid(If(Grid1.Rows(Click_Index).Cells(1).Value IsNot Nothing, Grid1.Rows(Click_Index).Cells(1).Value.ToString(), ""))')
    
    # Remove Grid1_Load handler
    content = re.sub(r'\s*Private Sub Grid1_Load\(sender As Object, e As EventArgs\) Handles Grid1\.Load\s*\n\s*End Sub', '', content)
    
    # Clean up
    content = re.sub(r'\n{4,}', '\n\n\n', content)
    
    if content != orig:
        write_file(path, content)
        print(f"  [FrmWorkStandardSet.vb] Fixed: {os.path.basename(path)}")

import re, os, sys

def read_file(path):
    with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8-sig', errors='replace') as f:
        return f.read()

def write_file(path, content):
    with open(path, 'w', encoding='utf-8-sig', errors='replace') as f:
        f.write(content)

def remove_flexcell_reference_vbproj(path):
    content = read_file(path)
    pattern = r'\s*<Reference Include="FlexCell[^"]*">\s*\n\s*<SpecificVersion>False</SpecificVersion>\s*\n\s*<HintPath>[^<]*FlexCell[^<]*</HintPath>\s*\n\s*</Reference>'
    new_content = re.sub(pattern, '', content)
    if new_content != content:
        write_file(path, new_content)
        print(f"  [vbproj] Removed FlexCell reference: {os.path.basename(path)}")
    else:
        print(f"  [vbproj] No FlexCell reference found: {os.path.basename(path)}")

def fix_frmpart_vb(path):
    if not os.path.exists(path):
        return
    content = read_file(path)
    orig = content

    content = content.replace('Grid1.BoldFixedCell = False', '')
    content = content.replace('Grid1.DisplayFocusRect = False', '')
    content = content.replace('Grid1.DisplayRowArrow = True', '')

    set_binding_match = re.search(r'Grid1\.SetDataBinding\(myDataSet,\s*"([^"]+)"\)', content)

        table_name = set_binding_match.group(1)

    content = re.sub(r'Grid1\.Column\((\d+)\)\.Width', r'Grid1.Columns(\1).Width', content)

    if 'Grid1.Columns(0).Width = 10' in content and 'Grid1.Columns(0).Visible = False' not in content:
        content = content.replace('Grid1.Columns(0).Width = 10', 'Grid1.Columns(0).Width = 10\n        Grid1.Columns(0).Visible = False')
    if 'Grid1.Columns(1).Width = 0' in content and 'Grid1.Columns(1).Visible = False' not in content:
        content = content.replace('Grid1.Columns(1).Width = 0', 'Grid1.Columns(1).Width = 0\n        Grid1.Columns(1).Visible = False')

    content = re.sub(r'\s*Grid1\.Column\(\d+\)\.CellType = FlexCell\.CellTypeEnum\.\w+\s*\n', '\n', content)
    content = re.sub(r"\s*'Grid1\.Column\(\d+\)\.Alignment = FlexCell\.AlignmentEnum\.\w+\s*\n", '\n', content)
    content = re.sub(r"\s*'Grid1\.Column\(\d+\)\.CellType = FlexCell\.CellTypeEnum\.\w+\s*\n", '\n', content)
    content = re.sub(r"\s*'grid3\.SortIndicatorStyle = FlexCell\.SortIndicatorStyleEnum\.\w+\s*\n", '\n', content)
    content = re.sub(r"\s*Grid1\.Column\(\d+\)\.Alignment = FlexCell\.AlignmentEnum\.\w+\s*\n", '\n', content)
    content = re.sub(r"\s*'Grid1\.Cell\(\d+,\s*\d+\)\.Text = .+\n", '\n', content)
    # Also remove 'Grid2.ExtendLastCol = True or 'grid3.ExtendLastCol = True type comments
    content = re.sub(r"\s*'[Gg]rid\d?\.ExtendLastCol = True\s*\n", '\n', content)
    content = re.sub(r"\s*'grid3\.NullText = .+\n", '\n', content)
    content = re.sub(r"\s*'grid3\.AllowUserSort = .+\n", '\n', content)
    content = re.sub(r"\s*'grid3\.Row\(\d+\)\.Height = .+\n", '\n', content)
    content = re.sub(r"\s*'Grid1\.Column\(\d+\)\.Locked = .+\n", '\n', content)

    content = content.replace('Grid1.EndCurrentEdit()', 'Grid1.EndEdit()')
    content = content.replace('intTopRow = Grid1.TopRow', 'intTopRow = Grid1.FirstDisplayedScrollingRowIndex')
    content = content.replace('intCurrentRow = Grid1.ActiveCell.Row', 'If Grid1.CurrentCell IsNot Nothing Then\n            intCurrentRow = Grid1.CurrentCell.RowIndex')
    content = content.replace('intCurrentCol = Grid1.ActiveCell.Col', 'intCurrentCol = Grid1.CurrentCell.ColumnIndex\n        End If')
    content = content.replace('Grid1.AutoRedraw = False', '')
    content = content.replace("Grid1.Cell(intCurrentRow, intCurrentCol).SetFocus()", "If intCurrentRow < Grid1.Rows.Count AndAlso intCurrentCol < Grid1.Columns.Count Then\n            Grid1.CurrentCell = Grid1(intCurrentCol, intCurrentRow)\n        End If")
    content = content.replace('Grid1.TopRow = intTopRow', 'If intTopRow >= 0 AndAlso intTopRow < Grid1.Rows.Count Then\n            Grid1.FirstDisplayedScrollingRowIndex = intTopRow\n        End If')
    content = content.replace('Grid1.AutoRedraw = True', '')

    content = re.sub(r'\n{4,}', '\n\n\n', content)

    if content != orig:
        write_file(path, content)
        print(f"  [FrmPart.vb] Fixed")

def fix_frmsearch_vb(path):
    if not os.path.exists(path):

    content = content.replace('Grid1.DisplayRowArrow = True', '')

    set_binding_match = re.search(r'Grid1\.SetDataBinding\(myDataSet,\s*"([^"]+)"\)', content)
    if set_binding_match:
        table_name = set_binding_match.group(1)
        content = content.replace(set_binding_match.group(0), f'Grid1.DataSource = myDataSet.Tables("{table_name}")')

    content = re.sub(r"\s*'grid3\.SortIndicatorStyle = FlexCell\.SortIndicatorStyleEnum\.\w+\s*\n", '\n', content)
    content = re.sub(r"\s*'Grid1\.Column\(\d+\)\.Alignment = FlexCell\.AlignmentEnum\.\w+\s*\n", '\n', content)
    content = re.sub(r"\s*'Grid1\.Column\(\d+\)\.Locked = .+\n", '\n', content)
    content = re.sub(r"\s*'grid3\.NullText = .+\n", '\n', content)
    content = re.sub(r"\s*'grid3\.AllowUserSort = .+\n", '\n', content)
    content = re.sub(r"\s*'grid3\.ExtendLastCol = .+\n", '\n', content)
    content = re.sub(r"\s*'grid3\.Row\(\d+\)\.Height = .+\n", '\n', content)
    # For active lines
    content = re.sub(r"\s*For i As Integer = \d+ To \d+\s*\n\s*Grid1\.Column\(i\)\.Locked = True\s*\n\s*Grid1\.Column\(i\)\.Alignment = FlexCell\.AlignmentEnum\.\w+\s*\n\s*Next\s*\n", '\n', content)
    content = re.sub(r"\s*'For i As Integer.+\n\s*'.*Grid1\.Column.+\n\s*'.*Grid1\.Column.+\n\s*'Next\s*\n", '\n', content)

    # Replace ExportToExcel
    export_match = re.search(r'If Grid1\.ExportToExcel\((.+?)\) Then\s*\n\s*MsgBox\("Done\.", MsgBoxStyle\.Exclamation\)\s*\n\s*End If', content)
    if export_match:
        content = re.sub(r'If Grid1\.ExportToExcel\(.+?\) Then\s*\n\s*MsgBox\("Done\.", MsgBoxStyle\.Exclamation\)\s*\n\s*End If', '', content)

    # Check if ConvertExcel method needs rewrite
    if 'Private Sub ConvertExcel()' in content and 'Grid1.ExportToExcel' not in content:
        # Already partially cleaned, now rewrite the method
        name_match = re.search(r'Dim excel_name As String = (.+)', content)
        if name_match:
            name_expr = name_match.group(1).strip()
            convert_pattern = r'Private Sub ConvertExcel\(\).*?End Sub'
            new_convert = f'''Private Sub ConvertExcel()

        Dim excel_name As String = {name_expr}
        Dim filePath As String = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\\Excel\\" & excel_name & ".csv"

        Try
            If Not System.IO.Directory.Exists(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\\Excel") Then
                System.IO.Directory.CreateDirectory(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\\Excel")
            End If

            Using sw As New System.IO.StreamWriter(filePath, False, System.Text.Encoding.Default)
                ' Header
                Dim headers As New System.Text.StringBuilder()
                For Each col As DataGridViewColumn In Grid1.Columns
                    If headers.Length > 0 Then headers.Append(",")
                    headers.Append("""" & col.HeaderText.Replace("""", """""") & """")
                Next
                sw.WriteLine(headers.ToString())

                ' Rows
                For Each row As DataGridViewRow In Grid1.Rows
                    Dim line As New System.Text.StringBuilder()
                    For Each cell As DataGridViewCell In row.Cells
                        If line.Length > 0 Then line.Append(",")
                        Dim val As String = If(cell.Value IsNot Nothing, cell.Value.ToString(), "")
                        line.Append("""" & val.Replace("""", """""") & """")
                    Next
                    sw.WriteLine(line.ToString())
                Next
            End Using

            MsgBox("Done.", MsgBoxStyle.Exclamation)
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox(ex.Message, MsgBoxStyle.Critical)
        End Try

    End Sub'''
            content = re.sub(convert_pattern, new_convert, content, flags=re.DOTALL)

    content = re.sub(r'\n{4,}', '\n\n\n', content)

    if content != orig:
        write_file(path, content)
        print(f"  [FrmSearch.vb] Fixed")

def fix_frmworkstandardset_vb(path):
    if not os.path.exists(path):
        return
    content = read_file(path)
    orig = content

    pattern = r'Private Sub Grid_Init\(\).*?End Sub'
    replacement = """Private Sub Grid_Init()
        With Grid1
            .Columns.Clear()
            .Rows.Clear()

            .Columns.Add("Col0", "")
            .Columns.Add("Col1", "")
            .Columns.Add("Col2", "ImageFile")

            .Columns(0).Width = 10
            .Columns(0).Visible = False
            .Columns(1).Width = 30
            .Columns(2).Width = 500

            .AllowUserToAddRows = False
        End With

    End Sub"""
    content = re.sub(pattern, replacement, content, flags=re.DOTALL)

    content = content.replace('.AddItem(Rs.Fields("ID").Value & Chr(9) & Rs.Fields("StandardFile").Value)',
                              'Grid1.Rows.Add(Nothing, Rs.Fields("ID").Value, Rs.Fields("StandardFile").Value)')

    # Fix Save_Grid - single record case
    content = content.replace('Rs.Fields("StandardFile").Value = Grid1.Cell(1, 2).Text',
                              'Rs.Fields("StandardFile").Value = If(Grid1.Rows(0).Cells(2).Value IsNot Nothing, Grid1.Rows(0).Cells(2).Value.ToString(), "")')
    # Fix Save_Grid - loop case
    content = content.replace('Rs.Fields("StandardFile").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 2).Text',
                              'Rs.Fields("StandardFile").Value = If(Grid1.Rows(i - 1).Cells(2).Value IsNot Nothing, Grid1.Rows(i - 1).Cells(2).Value.ToString(), "")')

    content = content.replace('Click_Index = Grid1.Selection.FirstRow',
                              'If Grid1.CurrentRow IsNot Nothing Then Click_Index = Grid1.CurrentRow.Index')
    content = content.replace('tmp = Grid1.Cell(Click_Index, 2).Text',
                              'tmp = If(Grid1.Rows(Click_Index).Cells(2).Value IsNot Nothing, Grid1.Rows(Click_Index).Cells(2).Value.ToString(), "")')
    content = content.replace('Grid1.Cell(Click_Index, 2).Text = tmp',
                              'Grid1.Rows(Click_Index).Cells(2).Value = tmp')
    content = content.replace('Grid1.Cell(Click_Index, 2).Text = Open.FileName',
                              'Grid1.Rows(Click_Index).Cells(2).Value = Open.FileName')
    content = content.replace('Delete_GRid(Grid1.Cell(Click_Index, 1).Text)',
                              'Delete_GRid(If(Grid1.Rows(Click_Index).Cells(1).Value IsNot Nothing, Grid1.Rows(Click_Index).Cells(1).Value.ToString(), ""))')

    content = re.sub(r'\s*Private Sub Grid1_Load\(sender As Object, e As EventArgs\) Handles Grid1\.Load\s*\n\s*End Sub', '', content)
    content = re.sub(r'\n{4,}', '\n\n\n', content)

    if content != orig:
        write_file(path, content)
        print(f"  [FrmWorkStandardSet.vb] Fixed")

# Process all projects
projects = [
    ("RH_JA01", "RH_JA01(201).vbproj"),
    ("RH_JA02", "RH_JA02(202).vbproj"),
    ("RH_JA03", "RH_JA03(203).vbproj"),
    ("LH_JA01", "LH_JA01(211).vbproj"),
    ("LH_JA02", "LH_JA02(212).vbproj"),
    ("END TEST", "END(210).vbproj"),
    ("SERVER SEARCH", "SERVEr Search.vbproj"),
    ("KU VIP 2ND BACK", "KU VIP 2ND BACK.vbproj"),
    ("KU VIP 2ND BACK JA01", "VIP 2ND BACK JA01.vbproj"),
    ("JA02", "FRT JA02.vbproj"),
    ("JA03", "FRT JA03.vbproj"),
    ("JA04", "FRT JA04.vbproj"),
]

for proj_dir, vbproj in projects:
    proj_path = f"{BASE}/{proj_dir}"
    print(f"\n{'='*60}")
    print(f"Processing: {proj_dir}")
    print(f"{'='*60}")

    # 1. vbproj
    vbproj_path = f"{proj_path}/{vbproj}"
    if os.path.exists(vbproj_path):
        remove_flexcell_reference_vbproj(vbproj_path)

    # 2. FrmMain.Designer.vb
    p = f"{proj_path}/FrmMain.Designer.vb"
    if os.path.exists(p):
        c = read_file(p)
        if 'FlexCell' in c:
            # Detect grid name and type
            if 'Friend WithEvents Grid1 As FlexCell.Grid' in c:
                if 'FlexCell.BorderStyleEnum.None' in c or 'DockStyle.Fill' in c:
                    fix_designer_grid(p, 'Grid1', 'io_monitor')
                else:
                    fix_designer_grid(p, 'Grid1', 'search')  # SERVER SEARCH uses this pattern
            if 'Friend WithEvents Grid2 As FlexCell.Grid' in c:
                if 'FlexCell.BorderStyleEnum.FixedSingle' in c:
                    fix_designer_grid(p, 'Grid2', 'io_monitor')  # KU VIP 2ND BACK JA01
                else:
                    fix_designer_grid(p, 'Grid2', 'io_monitor')

    # 3. FrmMain.vb
    fix_frmmain_vb_init_grid(f"{proj_path}/FrmMain.vb")

    # 4. FrmPart.Designer.vb
    fix_designer_grid(f"{proj_path}/FrmPart.Designer.vb", 'Grid1', 'part')

    # 5. FrmPart.vb
    fix_frmpart_vb(f"{proj_path}/FrmPart.vb")

    # 6. FrmSearch.Designer.vb
    fix_designer_grid(f"{proj_path}/FrmSearch.Designer.vb", 'Grid1', 'search')

    # 7. FrmSearch.vb
    fix_frmsearch_vb(f"{proj_path}/FrmSearch.vb")

    # 8. FrmWorkStandardSet.Designer.vb
    fix_designer_grid(f"{proj_path}/FrmWorkStandardSet.Designer.vb", 'Grid1', 'workstandard')

    # 9. FrmWorkStandardSet.vb
    fix_frmworkstandardset_vb(f"{proj_path}/FrmWorkStandardSet.vb")

    # 10. FrmAngleSet (JA03)
    fix_designer_grid(f"{proj_path}/FrmAngleSet.Designer.vb", 'Grid1', 'angle')

    # 11. FrmToolSet (KU VIP 2ND BACK JA01)
    fix_designer_grid(f"{proj_path}/FrmToolSet.Designer.vb", 'Grid1', 'toolset')

print("\n\nBatch processing complete.")
